policy_changes.apply: Change price objection handler from 'value_plus_lower_tier' to 'value_plus_lower_tier_offer' to ensure direct price objection addressing with cheaper alternative offered.
policy_changes.expected_effect: Agent will directly respond to price objections by offering a lower-tier alternative, improving objection handling and user satisfaction.

script_changes.apply: Add 'price_direct_response' template to script pack to enable direct acknowledgment of price concerns before offering alternatives.
script_changes.expected_effect: Agent can explicitly acknowledge price objections, making responses more relevant and improving objection handling.

reasons: Candidate updates directly address the root cause of failure by improving price objection handling.
New policy changes the price objection handler to one that offers a lower-tier alternative, aligning with best practices.
Script pack adds a direct price objection acknowledgment template, improving relevance and user satisfaction.
No high-risk changes; updates are targeted and coherent with current policy and script structure.
llm_gate.notes: Applying candidate will likely improve objection handling without introducing regression risks.
